design_philosophy: A high-contrast, luxury iteration of the organic archetype. The site must feel grounded in African soil (terracotta/laterite accents) and lush forests (deep obsidian green) while maintaining the sharp, authoritative, and clean precision of an elite corporate consulting firm. It MUST NOT look like a generic Western tech or environmental template (e.g., Tetra Tech).

hierarchy.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl+ font-black tracking-tighter leading-none text-primary
hierarchy.overline: text-xs font-mono uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-accent font-bold

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous spacing. Containers with borders must use internal padding like p-8 or p-12.
spacing_and_layout.grid_system: Bento Grid Mode A (Tetris) for visual sections. Avoid basic symmetrical columns. Mix 3+ shapes: The Hero (col-span-8 row-span-2), The Square (col-span-4), The Tall (col-span-4 row-span-2). Leave 'breathing room'.
spacing_and_layout.mobile_first: Images max-h-[80vh] on mobile. Stack to grid-cols-1.

components_and_surfaces.nav_header: Crystal Glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl bg-background/80, 1px subtle inner border border-white/40. MUST have visible links on desktop, NO generic hamburger on desktop.
components_and_surfaces.cards: Sharp, tactile, high-contrast. Use flat backgrounds (card) with 1px border (border-border). Hover state: slight lift (-translate-y-1), subtle shadow (shadow-xl), border color darkens.
components_and_surfaces.buttons: Primary buttons: bg-primary text-white, sharp corners or very subtle rounding (rounded-sm). Hover: bg-primary/90. Use mono font for button text. Accent buttons: bg-accent text-white.
components_and_surfaces.forms: Use Shadcn Form, Input, Select, Textarea but styled to match: bg-transparent border-b-2 border-border focus:border-primary rounded-none. No generic boxy inputs.
components_and_surfaces.footer: Massive Space: py-24. Contrast Shift: Dark Footer (bg-primary text-white). Massive 'Let's Talk' CTA.

motion.scroll: Use Lenis for smooth momentum scrolling. This is MANDATORY for the premium feel.
motion.entrance: Framer motion for staggered entrances on lists and grids. Avoid dizzying heavy motion. Focus on elegant fades and slow Y-axis shifts (y: 20 -> 0).
motion.hover: Explicit hover states on all interactive elements. transition-transform 0.3s ease, transition-colors 0.3s ease.

image_urls.description: Aerial view showing solar farm and farmland, conveying high-end energy and land management.
Dark green abstract leaf texture, perfect for background overlays or bento card backgrounds.
African business professionals in a meeting. Use for About or Team page header.
Modern high-rise corporate building for industry or corporate overview.
Aerial view of a dirt road in a green field. Perfect for 'Environmental Impact Assessment' project card.
People in a small boat on a river in Ghana. Perfect for 'Water Resource Management' project.
Lush green leaves. Use for 'Biodiversity Studies' project.

instructions_to_main_agent: You MUST use raw standard HTML/Tailwind classes for all main creative page layouts to ensure asymmetry and precise bento grid spans. DO NOT overuse Shadcn's layout wrappers for marketing sections.
Use Shadcn UI for interactive elements only (Forms, Inputs, Buttons, Dialogs, Admin Panel).
Admin Panel: Use 'Control Room' dense grid design. Cardless, sharp 1px borders, white background. Contrast deeply with the marketing pages.

Colors: Override Tailwind's default colors in tailwind.config.js using the CSS variables defined in this JSON. Ensure pure white is only used inside cards or text to maintain the rich Warm Sand background.
Typography: Use Outfit for Headings and Manrope for body. Make sure to import them via standard CSS or next/font.
Hero Section Overlay: Use a max opacity of bg-black/40 over the hero image. Do NOT use a solid color blanket.
Testing Attributes: All interactive elements MUST include `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid="contact-submit-btn"`).
